articles.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?

articles.title: ASML is kicking off tech earnings. Here’s what to expect from Europe’s biggest semiconductor supplier.

articles.description: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

articles.title: Why Citigroup is the one to watch when banks report earnings this week
articles.description: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.

articles.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
articles.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

articles.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
articles.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

articles.title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
